gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/290)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/290)
text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ بَكْرِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ زَكَرِيَّا أَبِي يَحْيَى قَالَ كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَسْأَلُهُ عَنِ الْفُقَّاعِ وَ أَصِفُهُ لَهُ فَقَالَ لَا تَشْرَبْهُ فَأَعَدْتُ عَلَيْهِ كُلَّ ذَلِكَ أَصِفُهُ لَهُ كَيْفَ يُعْمَلُ فَقَالَ لَا تَشْرَبْهُ وَ لَا تُرَاجِعْنِي فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Muhammad Bin Ismail – similar to it.
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Bakr Bin Salih, from Zakariyya Abu Yahya who said,

‘I wrote to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> asking him<sup>asws</sup> about the fermented drink, and I described it to him<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not drink it’. So I re-iterated to him<sup>asws</sup>, during all of that I described it to him<sup>asws</sup> how it is made. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Neither drink it nor come back to me<sup>asws</sup> with regards to it’.
en.sarwar: 12. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Bakr ibn Salih from Zakariya abu Yahya who has said the following: “I once wrote to abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asked about al-Fuqa ’ and described it for him (the Imam) how it is made. He (the Imam) said, ‘Do not drink it and do not come back to me about it again.’”
